sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports experiencing lightheadedness and nausea, particularly when sitting in a car. He reports a slight nick from chopping onions and a slightly decreased appetite. He denies significant weight loss or night sweats.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's hemoglobin is 8.2 g/dL. A slight polyp was identified during endoscopy and biopsied. The patient has tenderness to the right lower quadrant upon palpation of the abdomen.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has anemia and gastritis with a mild polyp. The patient's symptoms are consistent with gastritis and possible bleeding.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order protonix 40 milligrams once daily. Order a complete blood count. Follow up in 2 weeks to assess response to protonix and hemoglobin level.
